---
title: "Experience"
page-layout: full
toc: false
format:
  html:
    sidebar:
      width: 250px
    css: custom.css
---
## Brief overview of my professional experience, skills, and a PDF download of my resume and CV. 

<div class="d-flex justify-content-center gap-3 mb-5" style="margin-top: 30px;">
  <a href="resume.pdf" target="_blank" class="btn btn-primary download-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Download Resume
  </a>
  <a href="V_Pletsch_CV.pdf" target="_blank" class="btn btn-outline-primary download-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-person"></i> Download CV
  </a>
</div>

::: {.column-margin}
### Education

::: {.education-item}

<div>
**University of Chicago**  

*Master of Social Science*
</div>
:::

::: {.education-item}
<div>
**DePaul University** 

*Bachelor of Sociology*
</div>
:::

### Skills

* **Programming**
    * R
    * Python
    * LaTeX
    * SQL
    
* **Data Science**
    * NLP BERTopic
    * FinBERT
    * Topic Modeling (LDA, Dynamic, Gamma/Beta Parameters) 
    * Granger Causality
    * Geo-spatial Analysis
    * Data Wrangling
    * Data Visualization
    * Model Evaluation (Coherence, Perplexity)
    * Econometric Modeling
    * Multivariate Analysis

* **Statistics**
    * Bayesian Inference
    * Regression Discontinuity Design
    * Propensity Score Matching
    * Difference-in-Difference
    * Interrupted Time-Series
    
 * **Research**
    * Mixed Methods (Qual/Quant)
    * Ethnography
    * Focus Groups
    * Grant and Proposal Writing
    * Interviewing
    * IRB
    * Report Writing and Data Dissemination
    * Study Design
    * Study Recruitment
    * Surveys

 * **Softwares**
    * MAXQDA
    * NVivo
    * Overleaf
    * SPSS
    * STATA
    * Survey Monkey
    * Qualtrics
    * Microsoft 365
    * Tableau
    * RShiny
    

:::

::: {.timeline}
  
::: {.timeline-item}
::: {.timeline-dot}
:::
::: {.timeline-content}
### Research Associate
#### NORC at the University of Chicago, Public Health Department

* Co-authored award-winning grant proposals.
* Co-designed survey.
* Wrangled largescale qualitative and quantitative datasets in SPSS, NVivo, and MAXQDA.
:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
::: {.timeline-dot}
:::
::: {.timeline-content}
### Graduate Research Assistant
#### NORC at the University of Chicago, The Bridge

* Researched hierarchy formation and its correlation with socioeconomic status.
* Assisted PhD candidates in the early development of an original study on the misattribution of arousal.

:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
::: {.timeline-dot}
:::
::: {.timeline-content}
### Undergraduate Researcher
#### Ich Und Du Lab at DePaul University

* Interviewed 20 participants for the rehabilitation of previously incarcerated LGBTQ+IA individuals study.
* Quantitative data analysis using STATA for the National Social Life, Health and Aging Project (NSHAP) and the High School and Beyond (HSB) Project, both focused on aging and geriatric populations

:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
::: {.timeline-dot}
:::
::: {.timeline-content}
### Research Intern
####  Fonselp, Buenos Aires

* Conducted partnership outreach, recruiting international nongovernmental organizations and corporations to invest in local Latin American communities.

:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
::: {.timeline-dot}
:::
::: {.timeline-content}
### Research Intern
####  Junior Achievement, Buenos Aires

* Conducted partnership outreach, recruiting international nongovernmental organizations and corporations to invest in local Latin American communities.

:::
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
::: {.timeline-dot}
:::
::: {.timeline-content}
### Policy Intern
####  Chicago Ward Alderman

* Organized Town Hall meetings between the Alderman and constituents.
* Drafted policy memos, took notes for city council meetings, prepped materials for meetings between the Alderman and community organizations and local businesses.

:::
:::
